item.title: 冥王武器等级列表与最佳武器排名（2022 年 10 月） | Hades Weapon Tier List With Best Weapons Ranked (October 2022)
item.description:
哈迪斯武器等级列表——为了帮助你逃离黑社会，这里是哈迪斯的所有武器，从最差到最好的排名。

寻找更新的哈迪斯武器等级列表？ 太好了，这正是您将在下面找到的。 我们已经对所有 Hades 的地狱武器（及其方面）进行了排名，从最好到最差，因此您可以选择合适的武器来更快地杀死成群的邪恶生物。

但也有强硬的敌人，甚至更强硬的 Boss，例如 Bone Hydra，在你逃离黑社会的过程中，你将不得不面对它们。 要轻松完成内容，您必须使用具有良好统计数据和技能的武器，并由宙斯、雅典娜和波塞冬等奥运选手增强。

因此，为了帮助您，我们创建了这个地狱武器等级列表，其中所有地狱武器按照有用性和性能排序，并考虑了祝福。

冥王榜排名的意义是什么？ 他们将帮助您轻松浏览内容。 虽然他们有点落后于S级。 你可以用它们来打败邪恶，但它们可能会让你付出一点代价。 等级 CHades（弱）——在我们看来，我们认为这些是我们的冥王武器等级列表中最弱的组合。 但是，这完全取决于您的游戏风格，因此，如果您喜欢其中一种，那就去吧。 冥王武器等级列表 - S 级

关键是Hades是一个有趣的rogue-lite，可以完成（如果你真的进入游戏，你需要至少10次运行才能看到学分），几乎所有的武器都在游戏中。

但是，有些地狱火武器比其他武器更好，尤其是在结合皮肤和祝福时，它们会更强大。

所以让我们从我们认为最好的冥王武器开始。

地狱阶 武器 守护神 S Varatha, 关羽守护神 S 的永恒之矛守护神, 混沌之盾守护神 S, 混沌之盾贝奥武夫守护神 S Coronacht, 凯龙星寻炉弓守护神

在我们的Hades武器等级列表中，我们有地狱武器+ Aspect A级组合，它们也非常好，可以帮助您对所有地牢中的邪恶势力造成大量伤害。

虽然这些也很棒，但它们在伤害和实用性方面都落后于 S 级，但你的游戏风格也很重要。

冥王阶武器 A Coronacht，寻炉弓 Hera A Stygian Blade，冥界之刃 Poseidon A Malphon，双拳 Demeter A Exagryph，Eris A Coronacht 坚固铁轨 A Coronacht，寻炉弓萨格勒斯的守护 A Aegis, 混沌之盾 宙斯的守护 A Malphon, 双拳 塔洛斯的守护 A Stygius, 冥界之刃 亚瑟的守护 A Aegis, 混沌之盾 萨格勒斯的守护 A Coronacht, 寻炉之弓的守护拉玛B级

相当不错的哈迪斯武器，不是很好但也不错，你当然可以从上面的列表中选择更好的，但这些对于几次地牢运行来说都很好。

冥王阶 武器 Aspect B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Lucifer B Varatha, the Eternal Spear Achilles B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Zagreus B Stygian Blade, The Blade of the Underworld 方面 Nemesis B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Hestia C

好吧，这些是我们认为是哈迪斯最弱的地狱武器。

请记住，这只是我们的意见，同样，这个 Hades 级别列表中的几乎所有武器都可以通过大部分内容，但有些会比其他更容易。

地狱阶 武器 方面 C 瓦拉萨，永恒之矛 冥王 C 马尔丰，双拳 吉尔伽美什 C 瓦拉萨，永恒之矛 萨格勒斯 C 斯泰吉乌斯，冥界之刃 萨格勒斯 C 马尔丰，双拳萨格勒斯 方面 如果您使用它们并成功使用它们并能够在故事中取得进展，然后继续使用它们，尤其是如果您喜欢它们的游戏风格。

有关Roblox 作弊码的更多详细信息， Mount And Blade 新闻访问APKRAMP.COM

一旦暂停，美国工人将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，usaworkers 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，usaworkers 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 usaworkers 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记美国工人的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记的 usaworkers 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Hades Weapon Tier List – To help you escape from the underworld, here are all of Hades’ weapons ranked from worst to best.

Looking for an updated Hades weapon level list? Great, that’s exactly what you’re going to find below. We’ve ranked all of Hades’ Infernal Weapons (and their aspects), from best to worst, so you can choose the right one to slay hordes of evil mobs faster.

**About Hades
**Hades is an amazing rogue-like RPG and dungeon crawler with fast-paced action and stunning graphics and a deep story that delves into Greek mythology.

But there are also tough enemies and even tougher bosses, such as the Bone Hydra, that you will have to face in your quest to escape the underworld. To get through the content with ease, you have to use a weapon with good stats and skills, enhanced by Olympians like Zeus, Athena and Poseidon.

So to help you with that, we have created this list of Hades weapon levels with all the infernal weapons ranked in order of their usefulness and performance and also taking blessings into account.

What is the meaning of the Hades Tier List ranking? Tier SHades (BEST) – The most powerful combination of weapon skins in Hades. They will help you get through the content with ease. Tier A(GREAT) Hades – Also great Hades weapons that can be used to try to successfully escape the Underworld. Although they are a bit behind the S level ones. Tier BHades (Decent) – These Infernal Arms in our list of Hades levels are just decent, meaning they are not the best but not the weakest in the game either. You can use them to defeat evil, but they may cost you a bit. Tier CHades (Weak) – In our opinion, we think these are the weakest combinations on our list of Hades weapon levels. However, it all depends on your play style, so if you like one of them, go for it. Hades Weapon Tier List – Tier S

The point is that Hades is a fun rogue-lite, which can be completed (if you’re really into the game, you need at least 10 runs to see the credits), with almost every weapon in the game.

However, there are some infernal weapons that are better than others, especially when combined with skins and blessings that make them more powerful.

So let’s start with what we think are the best Hades weapons.

Tier Hades Weapon Aspect S Varatha, the Eternal Spear Aspect of Guan Yu S Aegis, Shield of Chaos Aspect of Chaos S Aegis, Shield of Chaos Aspect of Beowulf S Coronacht, the Hearth-Seeking Bow Aspect of Chiron Tier A

Next on our list of Hades weapon levels, we have the Infernal Weapons + Aspect level A combinations, which are also very good and can help you deal a lot of damage to evil forces in all dungeons.

While these are also awesome, they are a bit behind the S-Tier ones in terms of damage and utility, but then again your play style matters too.

Tier Hades Weapon Aspect A Coronacht, the Hearth-Seeking Bow Aspect of Hera A Stygian Blade, Blade of the Underworld Aspect of Poseidon A Malphon, Twin Fists Aspect of Demeter A Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Eris A Coronacht, the Hearth-Seeking Bow Aspect of Zagreus A Aegis, Shield of Chaos Aspect of Zeus A Malphon, Twin Fists Aspect of Talos A Stygius, the Blade of the Underworld Aspect of Arthur A Aegis, Shield of Chaos Aspect of Zagreus A Coronacht, the Hearth-Seeking Bow Aspect of Rama Tier B

Pretty decent Hades weapons, not great but not bad, you can certainly pick better ones from the lists above, but these will be fine for a couple of dungeon runs.

Tier Hades Weapon Aspect B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Lucifer B Varatha, the Eternal Spear Aspect of Achilles B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Zagreus B Stygian Blade, the Blade of the Underworld Aspect of Nemesis B Exagryph, Adamant Rail Aspect of Hestia Tier C

Alright, these are what we believe to be Hades’ weakest infernal arms.

Keep in mind that this is just our opinion, and again, almost every weapon in this list of Hades levels can make it through most of the content, but some will make it easier than others.

Tier Hades Weapon Aspect C Varatha, the Eternal Spear Aspect of Hades C Malphon, Twin Fists Aspect of Gilgamesh C Varatha, the Eternal Spear Aspect of Zagreus C Stygius, the Blade of the Underwold Aspect of Zagreus C Malphon, Twin Fists Aspect of Zagreus If you use them and are successful with them and are able to advance in the story, then keep using them, especially if you like their style of play.

For more Details about Roblox Cheat Codes , Mount And Blade News Vist APKRAMP.COM

Once suspended, usaworkers will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, usaworkers will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by usaworkers will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If usaworkers is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag usaworkers:

usaworkers consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging usaworkers will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: usaworkers

item.title: 使用 React18 的一个很好的理由：useSyncExternalStore | A good reason to use React18: useSyncExternalStore
item.description:
让我们考虑一个简单的 ToDo
这是你的同事在度假前留给你的礼物💩：

密码箱

在index.js中，在调用其他函数的组件之间传递的组件中有一堆函数。 如果这是一个真正的项目，那就更糟了

因为组件树更深


并且组件的嵌套增加了复杂性！

让我们创建一个 STORE

让我们尝试从 COMPONENT 推断 LOGIC 和 STATUS 以将其放入 STORE。

 const myStore = { callbacks : new Set (), subscribe : ( callback ) => { myStore . callbacks . add ( callback ) return () => myStore . callbacks . delete ( callback ) }, getSnapshot : () => myStore . state , changeState : ( newState ) => { myStore . state = newState myStore . callbacks . forEach ( cb => cb () ) }, }

它是使用新的 React18 钩子useSyncExternalStore的 STORE 的通用实现（但也可以使用 React17 完成！）。

所以：

  • 请记住，状态是不可变的！ 并通知所有注册的callbacks更改

输入状态

const myStore = { ... state : { todos : [ { desc : " init value " }, ], todoInEdit : { desc : "" }, }, ... }

这是我们的 VIEW（在本例中为 ToDo 应用程序）应该是什么样子的图片。
输入突变体

const myStore = { ... setTodos : todos => myStore . changeState ({ ... myStore . state , todos }), setTodoInEditProp : prop => myStore . changeState ({ ... myStore . state , todoInEdit : { ... myStore . state . todoInEdit , ... prop } }), ... }

他们只需通过将修改后的状态传递给 changeState 来执行changeState 。 因此，他们将通知组件的更改。

让我们添加动作

const myStore = { ... deleteTodo : ( index ) => { const newTodos = myStore . state . todos . filter (( _ , i ) => i !== index ) myStore . setTodos ( newTodos ) }, addTodoInEdit : () => { const newTodos = [... myStore . state . todos , myStore . state . todoInEdit ] myStore . setTodos ( newTodos ) myStore . setTodoInEditProp ({ desc : "" }) }, ... }

让我们更新视图

function App () { return (< div > < List /> < Form /> </ div >); } function List () { const state = useSyncExternalStore ( store . subscribe , store . getSnapshot ) return ( < ul > { state . todos . map (( td , index ) => (< li > { td . desc } < button onClick = { _ => store . deleteTodo ( index ) } > Delete </ button > </ li >)) } </ ul > ) } function Form () { const state = useSyncExternalStore ( store . subscribe , store . getSnapshot ) const handleChange = e => store . setTodoInEditProp ({ desc : e . target . value }) const handleClickAdd = _ => store . addTodoInEdit () return (< div > < input value = { state . todoInEdit . desc } onChange = { handleChange } /> < button onClick = { handleClickAdd } > Add </ button > </ div >) }

组件更具可读性

并且可以毫无问题地移动。
例如，可以将List放在另一个组件中而无需更改任何内容，因为它不再“依赖”其 PARENT

实际上List没有属性

这也使单元测试更容易。

简而言之，如果我必须改变行为，我必须查看商店。
如果我必须更改显示，我将不得不对 COMPONENTS 采取行动

乔恩

当然我做了一个😃在我看来，与其他人相比，它允许 1) 完美地看到它在引擎盖下是如何工作的。 如果您愿意，请在此处查看

一旦暂停，air_choosy 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，air_choosy 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，air_choosy 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 air_choosy 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 air_choosy 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 air_choosy 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Let's consider a simple ToDo
This is what your colleague left you as a gift 💩 before going on holiday:

codesandbox

In index.js there is a mess of functions within components passed between components that call other functions. And if it were a real project it would be MUCH MUCH worse

because the COMPONENT TREE is deeper


and the nesting of COMPONENTs multiplies the complexity!

Let's create a STORE

Let us try to extrapolate the LOGIC and STATUS from the COMPONENTs to put it into a STORE.

const myStore = { callbacks: new Set(), subscribe: (callback) => { myStore.callbacks.add(callback) return () => myStore.callbacks.delete(callback) }, getSnapshot: () => myStore.state, changeState: (newState) => { myStore.state = newState myStore.callbacks.forEach( cb => cb() ) }, }

codesandbox

It is a generic implementation of a STORE using useSyncExternalStore the new React18 hook (but it can also be done with React17!).

therefore:

  • subscribe Stores a callback to be called when the STATE of the STORE is changed
  • getSnapshot Returns the current STATE
  • changeState It is convenient to exchange one STATE for another STATE. Remember that a STATE is immutable! And notify all registered callbacks of the change

Enter the STATE 

const myStore = { ... state: { todos: [ { desc : "init value" }, ], todoInEdit: { desc: "" }, }, ...
}

codesandbox

It is a picture of what our VIEW, in this case the ToDo app, should look like.
A STATE represents one and only one view of the VIEW.

Enter the MUTATORS 

const myStore = { ... setTodos: todos => myStore.changeState({ ...myStore.state, todos }), setTodoInEditProp: prop => myStore.changeState({ ...myStore.state, todoInEdit: { ...myStore.state.todoInEdit, ...prop } }), ...
}

codesandbox

They simply execute the changeState by passing it the modified STATE. Consequently, they will notify the changes to the COMPONENTS.

(as said before)

Let's add the ACTIONS 

const myStore = { ... deleteTodo: (index) => { const newTodos = myStore.state.todos.filter ((_,i)=>i!==index) myStore.setTodos(newTodos) }, addTodoInEdit: () => { const newTodos = [...myStore.state.todos, myStore.state.todoInEdit] myStore.setTodos(newTodos) myStore.setTodoInEditProp({desc: ""}) }, ...
}

codesandbox

Let's update the VIEW 

function App() { return (<div> <List /> <Form /> </div>);
} function List() { const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot) return ( <ul> {state.todos.map((td, index) => (<li> {td.desc} <button onClick={_=>store.deleteTodo(index)}> Delete </button> </li>))} </ul> )
} function Form() { const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot) const handleChange = e => store.setTodoInEditProp({desc:e.target.value}) const handleClickAdd = _ => store.addTodoInEdit() return (<div> <input value={state.todoInEdit.desc} onChange={handleChange} /> <button onClick={handleClickAdd}>Add</button> </div>)
}

codesandbox

The STORE is responsible for managing the LOGIC and the STATE
the VIEW simply synchronises with the STORE

The COMPONENTS are more readable

and can be moved without problems.
For example, List can be put inside another component without changing anything because it is no longer "dependent" on its PARENT

In fact List has no properties

this also makes unit-testing easier.

In short, if I have to change the behavior I have to look at the STOREs.
If I have to change the display I will have to act on the COMPONENTS

Jon

There are many libraries in React (as usual) that allow STATE management. Of course I made one 😃 In my opinion, compared to the others, it allows 1) to see perfectly how it works under the hood. NO MAGIC 2) is super light

3) does only this, and nothing else

If you want, check it out here

Once suspended, air_choosy will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, air_choosy will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by air_choosy will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If air_choosy is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag air_choosy:

air_choosy consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging air_choosy will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: air_choosy
